bullish.ema: price above 50 EMA and 50 EMA above 200 EMA (golden cross structure)
bullish.market_structure: series of higher highs and higher lows, recent swing low held

bearish.ema: price below 50 EMA and 50 EMA below 200 EMA (death cross structure)
bearish.rsi: RSI 14 between 30 and 50 (bearish momentum without oversold)
bearish.market_structure: series of lower highs and lower lows, recent swing high rejected

neutral.ema: price oscillating around 50 EMA or 50/200 EMAs converging
neutral.rsi: RSI 14 near 50 with no clear directional pressure
neutral.market_structure: range-bound price action, no clear HH/HL or LH/LL pattern

risk_rules.stop_loss: below nearest swing low (long) or above nearest swing high (short)
risk_rules.take_profit: minimum 2R; trail stop on higher timeframe structure after 1R hit
avoid_entries: within 30 min of major macro news
when daily volume is below 20-day average by more than 40%
when RSI is above 75 (overbought) for longs or below 25 (oversold) for shorts
